lifecycle.reason: Requires an authenticated Canva account and editable design access that are not available.

summary.original: Create on-brand Canva presentations from a brief, outline, existing Canva doc, or design link. Use when the user wants a branded slide deck, wants to turn notes into a presentation, or needs a presentation generated in Canva with the right brand kit and a clear slide plan.
summary.zhCN: Canva 品牌演示文稿：Create on-brand Canva presentations from a brief, outline, existing Canva doc, o…

description.original: Create on-brand Canva presentations from a brief, outline, existing Canva doc, or design link. Use when the user wants a branded slide deck, wants to turn notes into a presentation, or needs a presentation generated in Canva with the right brand kit and a clear slide plan. Official skill document adapted by Agent-OPT as a dedicated bilingual Web skill studio with section navigation, full-text search, and sandboxed source rendering. No upstream executable scripts are executed.
description.zhCN: Canva 品牌演示文稿。Agent-OPT 将官方 SKILL.md 适配为独立 Web 技能工作室：支持章节导航、全文检索、中英对照元数据与只读源码呈现；不执行上游脚本，不访问外部账号。

description.original: Rank the pinned skill sections against a bounded user objective and context, then produce an agent prompt, checklist, or reference pack without executing upstream scripts.
Open the full official skill document with structured sections.
description.zhCN: 以结构化章节打开完整官方技能文档。

description.original: Keyword search across the skill body with line-level excerpts.
description.zhCN: 在技能正文中做关键词检索并返回行级摘录。

description.original: Jump between markdown headings and inspect one section at a time.
description.zhCN: 在 Markdown 标题之间跳转，并按章节查看内容。

notes: In-process skill runtime reads only catalog/skill-bodies/<slug> files prepared at curation time.
Upstream scripts, if any, are not executed by Agent-OPT.
No network, credentials, or host filesystem access is granted to the skill body.
Blocked capability note: Requires an authenticated Canva account and editable design access that are not available.
The current local reader/playbook adapter does not execute or claim verification of the blocked upstream workflow.
Official path-addressed skill with preserved source text and dedicated Web skill studio.
Marked verified after in-process core/scenario/error/web tests of the skill reader runtime for this body snapshot.
Original SKILL.md is preserved exactly; the current Chinese metadata is partial and must not be treated as a complete skill translation.
Deferred candidate; translation review is not scheduled until higher-priority skills pass the full gate.

agent prompt, checklist, and reference-pack modes
relevance-ranked sections from the pinned SKILL.md
